findings.title: Pipeline Consolidation Summary
findings.description: Consolidated 42 findings from 7 agents into 34 unique findings. Removed 8 duplicates. Identified 3 cross-agent conflicts.

findings.title: Top Priority Findings
findings.description: Highest priority items based on weighted scoring (user_impact×0.35 + business_value×0.30) / (effort×0.20 + risk×0.15): North Star Metric: User Engagement (score=3.417); Primary KPI: Notification Click-Through Rate (CTR) (score=3.129); Need for Notification Priority Levels (score=2.882); Competitor Landscape Overview (score=2.882); Guardrail Metric: Unsubscribe Rate (score=2.771)

findings.title: Cross-Agent Conflict Resolution Report
findings.description: Resolved 3 conflicts between agent findings. intake-001 vs requirements-010: Privacy risk detected in notifications conflicts with the need for compliance documentation related to privacy regulations.; intake-005 vs feasibility-002: Accessibility issues reported in the notification center may be exacerbated by push notification delivery failures on Android 14, impacting user experience.; competitive-004 vs risk-003: Pricing sensitivity in the market could be undermined by the risk of high pricing concerns, potentially affecting user acquisition.

evidence.excerpt: Privacy risk detected in notifications conflicts with the need for compliance documentation related to privacy regulations.
Accessibility issues reported in the notification center may be exacerbated by push notification delivery failures on Android 14, impacting user experience.
Pricing sensitivity in the market could be undermined by the risk of high pricing concerns, potentially affecting user acquisition.

conflicts.description: Privacy risk detected in notifications conflicts with the need for compliance documentation related to privacy regulations.
conflicts.resolution: Conduct a privacy impact assessment to ensure all notification features comply with privacy regulations before implementation.
conflicts.reasoning: Compliance with privacy regulations is paramount; addressing privacy risks upfront will allow for the development of features that meet user needs without compromising privacy.

conflicts.description: Accessibility issues reported in the notification center may be exacerbated by push notification delivery failures on Android 14, impacting user experience.
conflicts.resolution: Prioritize fixing push notification delivery on Android 14 while simultaneously addressing accessibility challenges to ensure all users receive notifications effectively.
conflicts.reasoning: Resolving the delivery failure is critical to maintaining user trust, while addressing accessibility ensures inclusivity, both of which are essential for user engagement.

conflicts.description: Pricing sensitivity in the market could be undermined by the risk of high pricing concerns, potentially affecting user acquisition.
conflicts.resolution: Reassess pricing strategy to ensure competitiveness while addressing user concerns about pricing to mitigate risk.
conflicts.reasoning: Aligning pricing with user expectations will help maintain market share and reduce vulnerability to competitive pricing strategies.

summary: Consolidated 42 findings into 34 unique items. Removed 8 duplicates, resolved 3 conflicts. Top priority: North Star Metric: User Engagement.
